programs.title: Sherri
programs.desc: Actress, comic and Emmy Award-winning longtime co-host of "The View" Sherri Shepherd appears before a live audience with a daily dose of pop culture, comedy, conversations and daytime talk staples, including celebrity and human-interest interviews.

programs.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programs.desc: Comic Leslie Jones stops by to talk about her latest special, "Leslie Jones: Life Part 2," and her nationwide tour; Joel and Cesar Cruz, proud dads to three adopted children, share their inspiring foster-to-forever journey.

programs.title: 25 Words or Less Live
programs.sub_title: Quick Wit Throwdown: Melissa Peterman vs. Ross Mathews
programs.desc: Quick wit meets big laughs as Melissa Peterman takes on Ross Mathews live -- every word counts.

programs.title: Dateline
programs.desc: When Matt Landry suddenly disappears, everyone suspects he is in danger; a violent bank robbery leaves police wondering if there is a connection.

programs.title: TMZ Live
programs.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.
